/usr/bin/c++    -rdynamic CMakeFiles/demo1.dir/main.cpp.o  -o demo1  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libopencv_highgui.so.4.5.4 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_ml.so.4.5.4 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_objdetect.so.4.5.4 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_photo.so.4.5.4 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_stitching.so.4.5.4 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_video.so.4.5.4 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_videoio.so.4.5.4 /usr/local/lib/libpaho-mqtt3c.so -lpthread /usr/local/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.5.4 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_calib3d.so.4.5.4 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_dnn.so.4.5.4 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_features2d.so.4.5.4 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_flann.so.4.5.4 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.5.4 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.5.4
